channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Ravens fans urged to donate for Kincaid after Bills fan organized effort for Andrews
item.description: Baltimore Ravens fans are being urged to donate to a group supported by Buffalo Bills tight end Dalton Kincaid, who had a pass go through his arms late in last weekend's playoff loss to the Kansas City Chiefs.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Man City rallies to beat Club Brugge and advance in Champions League. PSG also wins and stays in
item.description: GENEVA (AP) — Manchester City stayed in the Champions League, barely. Paris Saint-Germain saved its elite status in style. Both had risked embarrassing exits before winning on Wednesday, grateful to be among the 24 teams in the knockout stage.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Super Bowl LIX storylines include Chiefs’ chase for three-peat, rematch with Eagles, and Taylor Swift
item.description: There is no shortage of storylines that make this year’s Super Bowl rematch between the Kansas City Chiefs and Philadelphia Eagles especially compelling.
item.dc:creator: Peter Sblendorio, The Mercury News

item.title: Utah Hockey Club narrows the choice of a permanent name to three finalists. It won't be the Yeti
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — The Utah Hockey Club has chosen three finalists for the permanent team name it will adopt beginning with the 2025-26 NHL season. The franchise will use a final round of fan voting to decide among the Utah Mammoth, Utah Hockey Club and Utah Wasatch.
item.dc:creator: JOHN COON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Courtney Vandersloot to sign with Chicago Sky, returning to franchise that drafted her
item.description: Free agent guard Courtney Vandersloot is headed back to Chicago, her agent confirmed to The Associated Press on Wednesday. The veteran guard will sign with the team that drafted her in 2011 after spending the last two seasons in New York, agent Lindsay Kagawa Colas said.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Objections flow in on NCAA settlement over 'unnecessarily harsh' impact of roster limits
item.description: Most of the objections posted Wednesday to the lawsuit settlement set to alter the college-sports model concerned the impact roster limits will have on players in so-called “Olympic sports,” some of whom have already been cut from their teams.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ohio State quality control coach placed on leave amid university investigation
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (AP) — Ohio State defensive quality control coach Joe Lyberger has been on paid administrative leave for the last month while the university investigates him. Ohio State's human resources department sent Lyberger a letter on Dec. 27 that noted he would be placed on leave immediately.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NHL's LA Kings, Anaheim Ducks to play preseason game at Mechanics Bank Arena
item.description: Mechanics Bank Arena officials said the NHL is returning to Bakersfield for an exhibition game for the first time in 10 years.
item.dc:creator: Jose Franco, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: School official appears to advise parents of trans athletes to change birth certificate to play girls' sports
item.description: Texas school district administrator allegedly seen instructing a prospective parent to change their trans child's birth certificate to play in girls' sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Scheffler brings No. 1 perspective to picturesque Pebble Beach Pro-Am
item.description: Scottie Scheffler says the golf world should put its chaos on hold and "soak in" this week's AT&T Pebble Beach Pro-Am.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Padres owner's widow says team would have signed Roki Sasaki if she was involved, amid succession lawsuit
item.description: The widow of the late San Diego Padres owner has provided a statement to Fox News Digital responding to claims her lawsuit hurt the team's chances of signing Roki Sasaki.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jalen Hurts will try to become 4th starting QB to win a Super Bowl after losing in his debut
item.description: Jalen Hurts bucked decades of history just by getting back to the Super Bowl after losing his first trip there as a starting quarterback. Now he will try to become the fourth quarterback to win the NFL's ultimate prize as a starting quarterback after losing his first Super Bowl start.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rick Pitino-coached St. John's completes the program's first unbeaten January since 1985
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Rick Pitino joked that senior guard Kadary Richmond was like a fine wine. “He keeps getting better with age,” Pitino quipped. “And he’s 35.” Even if he was 35 and not 23, Richmond still would not have been born the last time St. John's got through January without a loss.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mike McCarthy withdraws from Saints' coaching search and won't coach in 2025, AP source says
item.description: Mike McCarthy has decided against coaching in 2025, removing himself as a candidate to fill the NFL's last remaining head coaching vacancy with the New Orleans Saints.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Warriors to retire Andre Iguodala's No. 9 jersey
item.description: As Andre Iguodala moves around town in the Bay Area these days, he is regularly stopped by fans eager to praise him for how he carried himself while playing for the Golden State Warriors.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Taylor Swift watches boyfriend Travis Kelce and the Chiefs beat the Bills and get back to Super Bowl
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — You could say that Taylor Swift's championship era has reached its second consecutive season.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mahomes and the Chiefs will face Hurts, Barkley and the Eagles as they seek a Super Bowl three-peat
item.description: Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce and the Kansas City Chiefs are going for a three-peat in a Super Bowl rematch. This time, Jalen Hurts and the Philadelphia Eagles have Saquon Barkley. The Eagles and Chiefs will face off for the Lombardi Trophy for the second time in three years on Feb.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Ryan Pressly waives no-trade clause to join the Chicago Cubs, AP source says
item.description: The Chicago Cubs are finalizing a trade for Ryan Pressly, adding the right-hander to the back end of their bullpen in their second major offseason deal with the Houston Astros.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Penske's pair of Porsches dominate as The Captain wins Rolex 24 at Daytona for 2nd consecutive year
item.description: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Roger Penske started his 59th season in motorsports the same way he closed last year — as a champion.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Saunders, Demin lead BYU past Cincinnati, 80-52
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Behind its best shooting half of the season, BYU outscored Cincinnati by 23 in the second half en route to 80-52 victory over the Bearcats on Saturday evening at the Marriott Center. “We have a lot of good shooters," BYU head coach Kevin Young said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Runnin' Utes get swept by Baylor, 76-61
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a tough week offensively for the Utah basketball team. After scoring just 35 points against Houston, the Utes put up 61 in a 76-61 loss to Baylor Saturday at the Huntsman Center. Norchad Omier had 22 points and 12 rebounds, and V.J.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Whirlwind at Farmers Insurance Open; Wind Delay at Round 2
item.description: Another day spent at Torrey Pines, but it was not a quiet day by any means.. This course is already a difficult in itself, but try adding Santa Ana winds that gust up to 35 miles per hour? The gusts dealing the day an hour and a half suspension..
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Tiger Woods' golf tournament moves from L.A. to San Diego due to fires
item.description: Tiger Woods' PGA golf tournament is moving from the Los Angeles area to San Diego as a result of the fires ravaging Southern California.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: Pair accused of selling fake Jason Kelce merchandise
item.description: Items included signed jerseys, helmets, hats, and photos, which were allegedly sold at several businesses.
item.dc:creator: Melanie DaSilva, NewsNation

item.title: Rays' agreement for the Trop could extend beyond 2028 season
item.description: The Rays demand Tropicana Field be repaired and ready for opening day of the 2026 season. In response, leaders with the City of St. Petersburg say their agreement doesn't include a "deadline" for the repairs.
item.dc:creator: Beth Rousseau, WFLA, NBC

item.title: NCDC Hockey Showcase Series coming to Grand Junction Feb. 8 and 9
item.description: On Feb. 8 and 9, River City Sportplex is hosting the Idaho Spud Kings and Rock Springs Grizzlies of the USPHL junior hockey league NCDC.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5
